text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint little town, lived a girl named Amelia. She had long, shiny curls and a mischievous sparkle in her eyes. Amelia lived next door to an old oak tree. Every day she'd climb up and swing from its gnarled branches.

One autumn day, while gathering acorns for her winter collection, Amelia ran into Tom. He was her old friend.

"Tom!" she giggled. "How are you feeling after being cooped up here all winter?"

He grinned. "Better now that I've fallen for your stories."

She laughed. "Tell me yours!"

"It's about a magical forest," he began. "You see, there was a wise old owl who lived in a hollow within that oak. He knew everything. Every leaf, every bird."

Amelia leaned closer. "Go on."

"You see, every year, on the forest's birthday, a fairy gifted the owl with anything he desired. This year, he'd
